steps.description: Press key: F1 to execute the "Preview Your App (F5)" command in the Microsoft Visual Studio Code interface under the "MICROSOFT 365 AGENTS TOOLKIT" section.
Type the text 'Debug:Select and Start Debugging' into the Command Palette within the Visual Studio Code application to select the debugging option.
Press the "Enter" key to confirm the "Debug: Select and Start Debugging" command from the Visual Studio Code command palette.
Type the text 'Teams workbench(Chrome)' into the search field of Visual Studio Code's "Run and Debug" interface to select the matching configuration item under the dropdown.
Press the "Enter" key to select the "Teams workbench (Chrome)" option within the Debug Configuration dropdown in Visual Studio Code.
Click on the "Email, phone, or Skype" input field within the Microsoft login page to activate it for text entry.
Type the text '${{env:M365_ACCOUNT_ADMIN_ACCOUNT}}' into the input field labeled 'Sign in' on the Microsoft login page.
Press the "Enter" key to submit the entered text in the "Sign-in email or phone number" field on the Microsoft login page interface.
Type ${{secret:M365_ACCOUNT_ADMIN_PASSWORD}} into the 'Password' field on the Microsoft login page for user ${{env:M365_ACCOUNT_NAME}}.
Press the "Enter" key to submit the login form on the Microsoft password entry screen labeled "Enter password."
Click the "Yes" button in the "Stay signed in?" prompt within the Microsoft login interface.
Click the "Add" button in the "TodoListSPFxlocal" application details window within Microsoft Teams.
Click on the "Search for a channel" input field within the "Added successfully!" dialog of the Microsoft Teams application interface.
Type text: 'testatk03' into the search input field located within the "Added successfully!" pop-up window in the "TodoListSPFxlocal" app interface, hosted on Microsoft Teams (web version).
Click the red "+" button next to the "testatk03" channel in the "Channels" section of the modal dialog labeled "TodoListSPFxlocal" within the Microsoft Teams web interface.
Click the "Go" button in the "TodoListSPFxlocal" pop-up window, located at the bottom-right corner, to proceed after selecting a channel.
Click the "Load debug scripts" button within the "Allow debug scripts?" dialog in the Microsoft Teams interface, located inside the "Chat" tab.
